title: viola × carinthiaca
intro: Viola × carinthiaca, also known as the Carinthian pansy, is a hybrid plant that results from the cross between the common pansy (Viola x wittrockiana) and the alpine pansy (Viola alpina). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Viola × carinthiaca include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and soothe digestive issues. Viola × carinthiaca is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
